log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Tiefling — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Tiefling — Bardic Musician HP: 59/67
--- Tiefling — Bardic Musician --- HP: 59/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Tiefling — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 39 damage. Tiefling — Bardic Musician HP: 20/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Tiefling — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:5+6=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
